calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Zhanna Jobe present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Janna Pailoon Jobe.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Reset To Jan-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner Dana Jobe present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court continued this matter to Jan. 27, 2004 at 09:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance by the minor's mother.
